page.title: Additional Fees
page.subtitle: Manage additional costs per collection
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Add custom fees to products by collection. They apply at checkout and you can show them on product pages with our widget.
onboarding.step.addFeeDesc: Create a rule with name & price
onboarding.step.collectionDesc: Assign to All Products or a collection
onboarding.readyToStartDesc: Add your first fee to see it at checkout and on your product pages.
celebration.title: Congratulations! Your first fee has been added!
celebration.desc: It will automatically apply at checkout for matching products. Add the Custom Fee Indicator widget on your product pages to show customers the fee before they buy.
table.name: Name
howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.step1: Click "Add Fee" to create a new additional fee rule — give it a name, price, and assign it to a collection.
howItWorks.step2: The fee will automatically apply at checkout for every product in the selected collection.
howItWorks.step3: Use the Custom Fee Indicator widget on your product pages to show customers the fee before they buy.
howItWorks.step4: Customize the widget appearance (badge color, text color) from the Editor settings panel.
plan.manageSubscription: Manage your subscription and plan details.
plan.premiumDesc: You have access to all premium features including collection-level fees and priority support.
plan.freeDesc: Upgrade to Premium to apply fees to specific collections and unlock all features.
pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs.
help.title: Need Help?
help.description: Having trouble setting up your fees? Our support team is here to help you get the best results.
moreApps.title: More apps by us
moreApps.frequentlyBoughtTogetherDesc: Show Frequently Bought Together in the Side Cart
moreApps.shippingAddressVerifierDesc: Protect your store from invalid orders
moreApps.productViewer360Desc: Interactive 360° product views that boost sales
moreApps.googleDriveViewerDesc: Embed & Share Google Drive files on your site
dialog.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
modal.addSubtitle: Fill the form below to add additional costs to an item
modal.name: Name
modal.upgradeToApplyFees: to apply fees to specific collections.
plugin.editorHint: This is a preview. Set up fees in the app dashboard.
plugin.defaultEmptyText: No additional fee is set. Please add a fee in the app dashboard to display it here.
panel.title: Fee Indicator Settings
panel.tipDesc: Manage your additional fees from the Dashboard for the best experience. This panel is for appearance and behavior settings.
panel.cancelledDesc: Your premium plan was cancelled. Renew to keep collection-level fees.
panel.freeDesc: Free plan supports fees on All Products only. Upgrade to target specific collections.
panel.showWhenEmptyDesc: Display a message when no fee is assigned
panel.emptyStatePlaceholder: No additional fee for this product.
ratePopup.title: How are you liking our app?
